legend.verification: Each feature has an executable verification command. State advances to 'passing' ONLY when verification succeeds.

features.behavior: Game loads, shows hub screen with currencies, alignment meter, heat meter, season record, and battle card

features.behavior: Save/load via localStorage (cu_save_v3): persists across reload, handles corrupt data gracefully, fresh start on empty storage
IPL-style auction: start auction, cards presented one-by-one, bid increases price, pass skips to next card, won players join squad
Full match sim: squad select -> prematch (strategy, pitch, opponent) -> ball-by-ball sim -> result with valid non-zero scores -> season record update

features.behavior: Squad screen: shows all members with stats, player detail overlay, training (costs coins, increases stat), release player (refunds coins, reduces squad)
League table with 10 teams, player team highlighted, promotion zone for top 2, season end triggers at match 15
Market overlay from hub: buy tab shows listings, sell tab shows squad players
5-zone alignment (-100 to +100), inertia at extremes, zone-specific theming, sponsor tier matching, clean streak tracking
Mafia banner in grey/corrupt zones, hidden for clean players, blocked during investigation, declining increases alignment
Debt escalation (stage increase, 20% interest), pay debt deducts black money, fails without funds
Investigation starts at high heat (5 match countdown), tribunal resolves with evidence-weighted verdict (7 possible outcomes)
Pep talk boosts morale (costs coins), media bribe reduces heat (costs coins), both fail without funds
Tutorial shows for new game, skippable via button
Settings overlay with team name input, saves on confirm
Procedural team crests (SVG), power ring, battle card, player silhouettes, spring physics, animated gradient backgrounds per screen, glass panels with elevation
Match with 3-player squad, max/min heat, max/min alignment, zero coins — no crashes
features.evidence: commit bba8848 — 5 edge case tests pass

features.behavior: Doping, conduct, corruption, board sanctions with match ban durations
Player/team name customisation, team color picker, manager name
features.evidence: Fully implemented in prototype/index.html (TEAM_COLORS + showCustomise/saveCustomisation, ~lines 6527-6600): team name, manager name, 8-color picker, per-player nicknames with originalName preservation. E2E: 'Customisation' group in comprehensive.spec.js (settings overlay opens, team name saves to state) — passing 2026-07-07.

features.behavior: Season/battle pass with tiered rewards
features.evidence: Syndicate Contract pass: 10 tiers x 70 XP (700 XP/season, free-completable in 14 matches — win 50/loss 25, +10 clean, +30 daily challenge), deterministic PASS_TIERS rewards (no gacha), premium track unlock 150 gems (virtual only, F2P-safe). GS.seasonPass in defaults/load/save, XP awarded in endMatch with Contract XP + tier-up reward rows, reset in endSeason, hub glass panel (tier chip + XP bar) opens distinct angular ledger overlay (#pass-overlay) with free/premium claim columns. E2E: 'Season Pass: hub panel, tier progression, claim + premium flow' in smoke.spec.js — passing 2026-07-07, full suite 112/112.

features.behavior: IAP stubs (coin packs, gem packs, season pass purchase)
features.evidence: 'The Vault' store overlay (#store-overlay, distinct steel-texture hero + angular pack cards) opened by tapping coin/gem chips in top bar. IAP_PACKS: 3 coin packs (1000/₹49, 3000/₹129 POPULAR, 8000/₹299 BEST VALUE), 3 gem packs (100/₹79, 300/₹199, 800/₹449), Premium Contract ₹199 (sets GS.seasonPass.premium, owned state). Simulated payment via custom bottom confirm sheet clearly labeled 'test mode — no real money charged' (no native confirm). Purchases logged to GS.purchases (defaults + load). Real billing = launch task. E2E: 'Vault store: open via currency chip, stub purchase grants goods' in smoke.spec.js — passing 2026-07-07, full suite 113/113.

features.behavior: Rewarded ad placements (extra auction purse, free pack, coin boost)
features.evidence: Sponsor Break stub: billboard overlay (3s timer), purse +300 (auction), free 2-card pack (cards), post-match coin doubler; daily caps 1/1/3 persisted — E2E green

features.behavior: Service worker for offline play, install prompt, app manifest
features.evidence: manifest.json (standalone, #060810 theme, 192/512 PNG + SVG icons incl. maskable), sw.js (versioned cache cu-v1, app-shell precache, network-first navigations with offline fallback, stale-while-revalidate assets), index.html head links + SW registration + beforeinstallprompt capture with Install App button in Settings overlay. E2E: 'PWA: manifest + service worker + app shell cache' in smoke.spec.js — passing 2026-07-07. SW verified active + full shell precached via headless Chrome.

features.behavior: Knockout bracket tournament mode beyond league
features.verification: manual — startKnockout() at season end (winRate >= 0.35 at matchNum > 14)
features.evidence: Fully implemented in prototype/index.html (~lines 5900-6050): startKnockout (4-team bracket: player + top-3 eligible rivals + wild cards), semi -> final rounds, play-or-sim per match, reward 300x(leagueIdx+1), wired into endMatch and save/load (GS.knockout). Verified in code audit 2026-07-07; no dedicated E2E yet.
